day1_after_choice.name: Me
choices: Sea told me to come hang out at the student council room
I'll go see Yuna again at the library
I'm curious about Ms. Riin at the nurse's office
I'll stop by the faculty room to greet Ms. Eunsu
I'll just head home for today

day1_after_sea_1.text: *A small room. Two desks, a locker, a plant by the window. Neatly organized.*

day1_after_sea_2.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_2.text: "You came. This is the student council room."

day1_after_sea_3.text: *She hands me a canned drink. Casual, natural.*

day1_after_sea_5.name: Me
day1_after_sea_5.text: "Better than I expected. You've been looking after me a lot, Sea."

day1_after_sea_7.text: *Sea lets out a small breath and smiles.*

day1_after_sea_8.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_8.text: "The first day is always the hardest. You don't know anyone."

day1_after_sea_9.text: *Sea looks out the window. The sunset light streams in.*

day1_after_sea_10.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_10.text: "...I'm glad you came, {name}. It gets kind of lonely being here alone in the student council room."

day1_after_sea_11.name: Me
day1_after_sea_11.text: "What about the other student council members?"

day1_after_sea_12.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_12.text: "There are some, but... I'm the only one who comes here after school."

day1_after_sea_15.name: Han Sea
day1_after_sea_15.text: "I'm really going to hold you to that? If you don't come, I'll storm your classroom."

day1_after_sea_16.text: *Sea locks eyes with me, confirming. I can't say no.*

day1_after_yuna_1.text: *Yuna is organizing photos at a window seat.*

day1_after_yuna_3.text: *Yuna flips through her camera and shows me photos. School scenery, cherry blossoms, cats.*

day1_after_yuna_4.name: Yuna
day1_after_yuna_4.text: "This cat is Cheese. I named him."

day1_after_yuna_5.text: *We chatted about cats for a while. Yuna's eyes sparkle as she keeps talking.*

day1_after_yuna_6.name: Yuna
day1_after_yuna_6.text: "...Will you come to the library again tomorrow?"

day1_after_yuna_9.text: *There was emphasis on the 'please.' ...Why so serious?*

day1_after_riin_1.text: *I had herbal tea with Ms. Riin. A relaxing time.*

day1_after_riin_2.name: Riin
day1_after_riin_2.text: "When you transfer, your whole environment changes. A lot of students end up having trouble sleeping or having strange dreams."

day1_after_riin_5.text: *Ms. Riin smiles and opens the door for me.*

day1_after_eunsu_1.name: Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_1.text: "{name}? You came to see me after school? That's sweet."

day1_after_eunsu_2.text: *She brews coffee and asks me about various things.*

day1_after_eunsu_3.name: Eunsu
day1_after_eunsu_3.text: "...{name}, did something happen at your previous school? Your transfer paperwork was a bit unusual..."

day1_after_eunsu_4.name: Me
day1_after_eunsu_4.text: "Unusual? It was just because my parents moved..."

day1_after_home_1.text: *Walking out the school gate, I glance back.*

day1_after_home_3.text: *...Someone is looking down at me from the third-floor window.*

day1_after_home_4.text: *Backlit, so I can't see the face. Just a silhouette. ...Near the window seat in the back row. Close to Seolhwa's seat.*

day1_after_home_6.text: *I turn around and walk. Time to head home.*
